failedAssertions.reason: Flet app crashes on launch with AttributeError: module 'flet' has no attribute 'icons'. All screens use ft.icons.X but Flet 0.28.3 API requires ft.Icons.X (capital I). Lock screen cannot display.
Flet app crashes on launch with AttributeError: module 'flet' has no attribute 'icons'. App cannot launch.
Flet app crashes on launch with AttributeError: module 'flet' has no attribute 'icons'. Navigation between screens cannot be tested.

appliedUpdates.description: Updated guidance: The Flet app now crashes on launch due to ft.icons vs ft.Icons API change in Flet 0.28.3. Prior ImportError (ft.colors) was fixed but ft.icons was not addressed.
Fixed backend-api start command: changed 'uvicorn src.main:app' to 'uvicorn src.api:app' since FastAPI app is in api.py not main.py. Backend API now starts correctly.
